title: Resource APIs, Idempotency, Concurrency, Pagination, and Consistency · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but broken consistent resource API and operation ledger; preserve the failing exchange, locate the first causal Node or Express boundary, and retain a regression probe. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in consistent resource API and operation ledger and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout.
Scope idempotency keys to principal and operation, compare canonical request fingerprints, store outcome atomically, expire deliberately, and reject mismatches.
Connect version columns, ETags, preconditions, atomic updates, affected-row checks, conflict disclosure, and safe retry behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Resource State Machine
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 8564 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then change the tenant and prove denial before repository access. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout.

Inspect the Resource State Machine trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Resource State Machine.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for model resource states, legal transitions, commands, representations, invariants, tombstones, and conflict outcomes independently of table layout. For Node and Express server Inspect the failure record · Debug Resource State Machine, keep Resource State Machine connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Outbox Consistency · fault isolation · Debug Outbox Consistency
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug team handles case 8373 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then fail the canary while the old revision drains and prove rollback remains safe. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.

Which observation would disprove this suspected cause: “Publishing an event immediately after COMMIT makes state and message delivery atomic.”?

Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; prove cleanup before the service deadline expires; then rotate a signing key while an old valid session remains within policy. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.

For Node and Express server Publish the incident record · Debug Outbox Consistency, challenge the documented misconception with request, response, fault, policy, and transfer evidence: Publishing an event immediately after COMMIT makes state and message delivery atomic.
